data.title: Add entries to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for every config key on the gap audit gap list
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What
Update `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` to document every config key in the gap list produced by `scan-config-keys.sh` (task b1d7-c727) and captured in the gap audit report (task 9f42-1afc). After this task, running `scan-config-keys.sh` must produce empty output.

## Behavior (Given / When / Then)
- Given the gap list from running `plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh`
- When CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has been edited to add an entry for every gap-list key
- Then the RED test (16f3-15d6) passes — `scan-config-keys.sh` produces empty output

## Files to Modify
- `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` (modify) — add entries for each missing key
- `.test-index` (modify) — remove RED marker `[test_config_keys_documented]`

## Entry format per key
Each new entry must include:
- Key name (e.g., `brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate`)
- Description (plain-language purpose)
- Type (boolean / integer / string / enum)
- Default value
- Example usage or example value

Preserve existing section headings and anchor IDs — Story C (3028-d955) INSTALL.md may link to specific anchors in this file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] scan-config-keys.sh produces empty output (all gap-list keys now documented)
  Verify: test -z \"\$(bash plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh \$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel))\"
- [ ] RED test now passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-config-keys-documented.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_config_keys_documented\]' \$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Every new entry contains description, type, default, and example
  Verify: python3 -c \"import re,sys; body=open('plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md').read(); assert body.count('Default:') >= 5 or body.count('default:') >= 5, 'expected at least 5 Default: markers'\"
